category_sources: source_facts.description says extremely fast JavaScript bundler and minifier; official README says esbuild is an extremely fast bundler for the web.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is esbuild; official site and repository consistently use esbuild.
docs_sources: Official esbuild site links Getting Started and Documentation/API pages from the project README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/evanw/esbuild; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies JavaScript bundling/minification; official README lists JavaScript, CSS, TypeScript, JSX, CLI, JS, and Go APIs.
